# Proof Map by Method Family

| Family | Core mechanism | Primary experiments | Main risk |
|---|---|---|---|
| Semantic Compression | Reduce reading load while preserving gist | EXP-001, EXP-014 | Over-compression / distortion |
| Typography / Anchors | Guide attention to operators/concepts | EXP-002, EXP-015 | Visual noise |
| Timing / Rhythm | Align or pre-cue semantic beats | EXP-005, EXP-016, EXP-024 | Mismatch or pacing disruption |
| Placement / Gaze | Protect critical regions and reduce gaze travel | EXP-003, EXP-018, EXP-028 | Bad segment fit |
| Visual Load | Match word count to frame complexity | EXP-004, EXP-019, EXP-026 | Over-simplification |
| Motion / Affective | Encode logic or tone | EXP-006, EXP-020 | Fatigue/distraction |
| Accessibility | Preserve full access | EXP-009, EXP-021 | Replacing captions with overlays |
| Adaptive Engine | Route methods by context | EXP-011, EXP-030 | Overfitting or automation errors |
